IBEW.text:
**Trampin the IBEW Indoor Locals — Saturday, July 11, 2026**

**LU-481 Indianapolis, IN** is still the heavyweight. Meade Electric's got 30 Inside JW slots on the Meta Data Center (Lebanon) at **$53.80/hr plus 10% adder** on specific dates — that's real money for July 15 & 20. Google Data Center work through Ermco runs outside new construction with serious background requirements. Industrial Electric's hospital retrofit inside IU is cleaner work: **$54.75 scale**, 5-10s with Saturday eights, OSHA 1 required. Board's sitting at 41 calls with ~204 hands — solid depth but the data center premium is moving bodies.

**LU-494 Milwaukee, WI** is the under-the-radar play. Port Washington Data Center jobs through Gurtz, MJ Electric, and Uihlein all pay **JW scale plus $10/hr** (that's likely pushing **$50+**) and they're hungry — 50-58 hour weeks with valid Wisconsin license required. Pieper's Milwaukee healthcare calls offer OT availability if you want it. 36 calls, 172 hands: book's not flooded.

**LU-1426 Grand Forks, ND** is pulling hands north hard. Parsons Electric's Polaris Forge Data Center (Harwood) — two separate calls totaling 78 slots — runs **$44.80/hr but $100/day non-taxed per diem** plus **$100 incentive Mon-Fri, $150 Sat-Sun**. That's **$50+ effective hourly** once you factor it in, 6-10s, 100+ mile GPS radius. Hunt Electric's AFBASE call is tighter but same incentive structure. 26 calls chasing 130 hands; this one's moving.

**LU-237 Niagara Falls, NY** and **LU-430 Racine, WI** both have locked-in **data center corridor work** — Lake Mariner and Microsoft respectively — at solid union rates (**$48.20** and **$62.51**) with first-shift predictability and per diem available. Neither board is stacked.

**LU-124 Kansas City, MO** runs 34 calls on Google NRD and Project Blitz; all require OSHA 10, drug test, background.

Data center work is consolidating the dispatch. The Midwest owns the board — Indianapolis, Milwaukee, Cedar Rapids, Kansas City — because the infrastructure boom isn't slowing and union shops are locked into PLAs.

LINEMAN.text:
**Trampin the IBEW Lineman Locals — Saturday, July 11, 2026**

**LU-71 Columbus, OH** is the board heavyweight right now: 48 calls, **$61.44/hr** top scale, and the depth is real—roughly 133 hands on the bench. NEW RIVER ELECTRIC is running dual distro jobs (41 hands Columbus, 10 Southern Ohio) at **$125/day per diem** with a **$100 bonus if you work every available day**—that's 50+ spots right there. JJM POWER has a 4-man crew hitting South Central distro in Chillicothe. THAYER POWER is stacking make-ready and reconduct work with **$500/45-hour and $600/55-hour bonuses**. This is sustained work, not a sprint.

**LU-1426 Grand Forks, ND** has 26 calls and about 130 hands deep, but the pay is softer. PARSONS ELECTRIC is bleeding 78 slots on the Polaris Forge Data Center in Harwood at **$44.80/hr** on 6-10's—ND license reciprocated within 30 days. APEX LINE is offering journeyman scale (**$58.50/hr**) on 6-12's with a **$100/day Monday incentive**, but only 6 spots. Hunt Electric on the Air Base runs 4-10's with OT Fridays.

**LU-583 El Paso, TX** is inside wireman territory with 10 calls at **$55.00/hr**—SUMMIT LINE, CUPERTINO ELECTRIC, and ROSENDIN (split between **$40 + $15 incentive** and straight $55) all need NM JIW licenses fast. Double-time OT across the board. Fire alarm experience moves you up at B&D.

**LU-474 Memphis, TN** is tight: 3 calls, 44 hands, but ARCHKEY SACHS is moving 38 hands on a Google data center job at **$36.65/hr** with a **$125/day incentive** on a 4/10 and 2/8 split. Utility data centers are absorbing bodies nationwide—this is where the rush is.

Data-center build-outs and AI infrastructure projects are pulling both transmission and inside crews hard across mid-America and upper plains. Book depth at the big distro locals means steady weeks ahead.
